title: Social Feed Studies
description: Three independent mobile feed mockups that fuse Song dynasty scenes with contemporary social UI structure.
creative_direction: Each image is an independent fictional mobile feed screen: a literati nine-grid post, a night-market comment thread, and a travel story stack. The UI should feel modern but not copy a real app.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is independent.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Social Feed Studies
en.description: Three independent mobile feed mockups that fuse Song dynasty scenes with contemporary social UI structure.

zh-CN.title: 社交动态单图研究
